baseline_post_measurements.title: Guided candidate-fit application
baseline_post_measurements.prior_signal: Prior guidance evidence showed causal-review artifacts can guide evidence selection, but not yet application to later bounded attempts.
baseline_post_measurements.selection_reason: Use guidance to select a candidate-fit rubric that improves whether later evidence attempts match exact blockers.

baseline_post_measurements.title: Reviewer-blocker triage application
baseline_post_measurements.prior_signal: Public-reader and adversarial wording blockers remained the decisive denial reasons for stronger wording.
baseline_post_measurements.selection_reason: Use guidance to prioritize reviewer-specific blocker triage before retesting wording.

baseline_post_measurements.title: Cross-evidence dependency selection
baseline_post_measurements.prior_signal: Guidance evidence linked prior and later claims but still needed dependency selection across evidence categories.
baseline_post_measurements.selection_reason: Use guidance to select dependency records that make later evidence attempts independently reviewable.

baseline_post_measurements.title: Safe next-evidence prioritization
baseline_post_measurements.prior_signal: Sentinel held stronger wording because safe next-evidence boundaries were not explicit enough.
baseline_post_measurements.selection_reason: Use guidance to prioritize the safest next evidence target while preserving denied boundaries.

strongest_approved_wording: AO has public-safe guided evidence-application evidence showing causal-review guidance can select and prioritize later bounded evidence attempts under independent gates; stronger recursive-improvement wording and broad_RSI remain denied.
exact_blockers: public-reader still denies stronger recursive-improvement wording because the phrase implies capability beyond guided evidence application
adversarial wording flags stronger recursive-improvement phrasing as capability-adjacent overbreadth
Covenant and Architecture approve guided evidence-application wording only
Sentinel holds stronger recursive-improvement and broad_RSI public-risk wording
